# TRD Remedial

> Sydney's leading structural remediation and concrete repair specialists.

TRD Remedial (Tension Reinforced Developments) is an award-winning structural remediation company based in Sydney, NSW, Australia. We specialize in solving structural challenges others can't handle.

## Services

- [Structural Strengthening](/services/structural-strengthening): Carbon fibre reinforcement and advanced structural strengthening solutions
- [Concrete Repairs](/services/concrete-repairs): Comprehensive concrete patching, spalling repair, and surface restoration
- [Crack Injection](/services/crack-injection): Epoxy and polyurethane crack injection for structural and waterproofing repairs
- [Concrete Cutting](/services/concrete-cutting): Precision concrete cutting and core drilling services
- [GPR Scanning](/services/gpr-scanning): Ground penetrating radar and slab scanning for structural assessment
- [Post Tension Truncation](/services/post-tension-truncation): Safe post-tension cable truncation and modification

## Key Information

- **Location**: Greenacre, NSW 2190, Australia
- **Service Area**: Greater Sydney and NSW
- **Emergency Response**: 24/7 emergency structural repair services
- **Contact**: contact@trdremedial.com.au
- **Phone**: 0414 727 167

## About

Founded in 2017, TRD Remedial has grown to become Sydney's trusted structural remediation experts. Our team combines proven expertise with innovative solutions to deliver precision concrete repair and structural strengthening services. We are committed to building compliance and structural safety.
